failed = (
    event: string,
    errorCode: number,
    errorDescription: string,
    validatedURL: string,
    isMainFrame: boolean,
  ) => {
    writeLog(
      "window",
      "renderer load failed",
      {
        window: name,
        event,
        errorCode,
        errorDescription,
        validatedURL,
        currentURL: win.webContents.getURL(),
        isMainFrame,
      },
      "error",
    )

    if (!isMainFrame || errorCode === -3) return
